text:
Favor Cushion コネクッション - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. Sitting someone on this cushion will grant you a favor.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Favor Cushion コネクッション - This card allows the caster to summon a Favor Cushion. If you seat somebody on it, they will do one thing for you regardless of their own personal feelings towards you. It also needs to be something within that person's capabilities.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.030 - コネクッション 
このクッションに誰かを座らせれば、その人は１回だけあなたのお願いを聞いてくれる。座った人の能力を超えてのお願いは無理。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.030 - Favor Cushion 
If you ask someone to sit on this cushion, they will listen to your plead only once. Cannot do anything that is beyond the capabilities of the person sitting.
|}
